summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed refs. No GitHub mutations were performed. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined; already-closed refs are not closed again; two open non-security PRs have close-style recommendations backed by hydrated replacement evidence.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive auth-provider/credential-sync work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope.
Already closed; historical evidence points to #87409/current main as the stronger implementation.
Open PR is already covered by a hydrated replacement/current-main implementation; close is allowed by job frontmatter and includes target_updated_at.
Standalone open PR with supplied proof should remain available for maintainer review; no close or merge action is safe in this plan job.
The PR is a standalone candidate with unresolved proof/review blockers; no shared canonical or close path is clear.
Tool-policy boundary work is security-sensitive under the cluster security boundary and must be routed, not backlog-cleaned.
Inline image rendering touches security-boundary-labeled media handling; route the exact item and avoid close/merge/fix mutation.
Open PR targets an obsolete runtime path and is superseded by a hydrated current-main implementation.
New session sidecar state/storage is security-sensitive for this workflow; route exact PR and continue unrelated classifications.
Gateway admin/reset authorization work is security-sensitive and must go to central security handling, not ProjectClownfish closeout.
